core_mechanism: a coarse-graining (subgrid closure) scheme that represents the aggregate effect of unresolved fine-scale degrees of freedom on the resolved coarse-scale dynamics as an added flux, decomposed into a conservation-law-preserving flux term and an entropy-dissipating diffusive term constrained by an entropy/monotonicity law
brief_reason: The abstract learns subgrid fluxes that correct a coarse simulation of a full-scale system, splitting the correction into a conservative flux-potential component and a dissipative eddy-viscosity component consistent with entropy variables, i.e. a structure-preserving coarse-graining closure.
